title: Youtube Poop Cartoon: MUNF MUNF!
description:
The king wants to show you the new cereals MUNF MUNF, but Luigi won`t stop annoying him. I took the gabber music from Bassdragons "Mario Gabberhead" video (the song is "Scott Brown Ft. DJ Neophyte - Blast Your Ass"). And by the way, I used the game Trackmania Sunrise for the car scenes. Oh, and the music, that plays when Mama Luigi and his car appears, is "New Disease" from Spineshank.
